prestazioni: Engine swap to 1ZZ-FE VVT-i (1.8L) with a custom-built turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, HKS 264° camshafts, and a Tomei 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold. Pair with a Haltech Elite 1500 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping, targeting 220 HP at 7,500 RPM with a 10.5:1 compression ratio.

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential, TRD 4.3 final gear ratio, and a KAAZ 2-way clutch for the 5-speed manual transmission (C56). Upgrade driveshafts to custom-length Tomei units with reinforced CV joints to handle increased torque.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (height-adjustable, 8kg/mm front and 6kg/mm rear spring rates), Whiteline 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars, and Cusco front strut tower bar. Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for the rear trailing arms to eliminate flex under hard cornering.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (PN RB-TOY-003) with custom-fabricated front canards and a carbon fiber rear diffuser from Seibon. Paint in Toyota Super White II (040) with a matte black roof wrap (3M 1080 series).

OEM+ JDM styling with Toyota Racing Development (TRD) Sportivo grille, TRD side skirts (PN 53801-28020), and a custom rear spoiler from Vertex (model VX-SP-TAN). Replace all badging with blacked-out Toyota emblems from DecalGirl.

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (JDM-spec, reclining), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage fabricated by AutoPower (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in). Replace the stock steering wheel with a Nardi Classic 350mm (leather-wrapped) and add a Defi BF Silver gauge cluster (oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR).
